completedWork: Current Source Interaction Simulator - NEW: Interactive simulation exploring how multiple current sources affect circuit behavior. Features: Dual current source configuration (I₁, I₂: 1-100mA), ideal vs practical source modes (infinite vs finite internal resistance), three-resistor network (R₁, R₂, R₃: 10Ω-10kΩ). Real-time calculations: Node voltages (A, B, C) using nodal analysis, branch currents (I_R1, I_R2, I_R3), KCL verification at all nodes (ΣI_in = ΣI_out), individual source contributions with comparison. Visual feedback: Interactive SVG circuit diagram with animated current flow (cyan for I₁, purple for I₂), color-coded source contributions, real-time KCL verification indicators (green valid/red invalid), current direction arrows, parallel vs series behavior demonstration. Quick presets: Current Mirror (matched sources for IC biasing), LED Array (constant current drivers), Solar Panel (parallel sources with practical resistance), Battery Charging (high current charging). Educational content: Ideal vs practical current sources, internal resistance effects, KCL with multiple sources, parallel current addition rules, applications (current mirrors, LED drivers, battery charging, 4-20mA current loops). File: pages/simulations/current-source-interaction.vue

Voltage Regulator Efficiency Calculator - NEW: Compare efficiency across linear, switching (buck), and zener shunt regulators. Features: Three-regulator side-by-side comparison, input parameters (V_in: 1-50V, V_out: 0.5-48V, I_load: 10mA-10A, switching frequency: 10kHz-1MHz, quiescent current: 1-50mA). Real-time calculations: Linear efficiency (η = V_out/V_in), Buck efficiency (85-95% typical), Zener efficiency (very poor), power dissipation for each type, junction temperature estimation (ΔT = P_loss × R_θJA), thermal warnings. Visual feedback: Efficiency comparison bar charts (blue for linear, green for buck, purple for zener), power breakdown chart (useful vs wasted power), side-by-side comparison table with all key metrics, status indicators (thermal warnings). Quick presets: Arduino Power (12V→5V, 500mA), Microcontroller (5V→3.3V, 200mA), Li-ion Battery Monitor (4.2V→3.3V, 100mA), High Current (24V→12V, 5A). Educational content: Linear regulator fundamentals (simple, low noise, η = V_out/V_in), Buck converter advantages (high efficiency, inductor energy storage, duty cycle D = V_out/V_in), Zener shunt limitations (inefficient, only for references), selection guide (when to use each type), thermal management, design trade-offs (cost, complexity, noise, efficiency). Detailed formulas and design considerations included. File: pages/calculators/voltage-regulator-efficiency.vue

Navigation Updates - Added Current Source Interaction simulation to pages/simulations/index.vue with animated SVG preview showing dual current sources with flow animation. Added Voltage Regulator Efficiency calculator to pages/calculators/index.vue with id=82, categorized under 'basic', 'power', and 'components' categories.

Both features use Vue 3 Composition API, include interactive SVG visualizations, preset configurations, and extensive educational content covering theory, formulas, and practical applications.
